title: 104 Pcs Halloween Potion Bottles with Cork Set Halloween Decorations Indoor Apothecary Bottles Decorations with Labels Stickers Charms Pendants Ropes and Funnels for Halloween Tiered Tray Decor
description:
Halloween Comprehensive Package: your purchase includes more than just bottles; You will receive 40 Halloween potion bottles with cork stoppers, 40 Halloween stickers, 20 charms pendants, 2 strings of ropes, and 2 funnels; Everything you need for your spooky themed party or event
Halloween Themed Design: embrace the Halloween touch with the spooky themed design of these Halloween decorations; All stickers and pendants are designed with Halloween elements, such as witches, bats, spiders, etc.; You can use them for Halloween tiered trays decor, table settings, perfume saving, or other place decorations; Each piece is crafted to lend an eerie, creepy atmosphere to your event, setting your preparations apart from the usual
Material and Durability: these potion bottles with cork in this set are made from durable glass material; Ideal for repeated use across different Halloween seasons or events without losing their charm and appeal
Variety of Sizes: crafted to fit various potion preparations, the Halloween witch decor consists of glass apothecary bottles in different capacities including about 0.3 oz/ 8 ml, 0.4 oz/ 12 ml, 0.5 oz/ 15 ml, 0.7 oz/ 20 ml; This selection of sizes caters to different brewing needs and preferences
Wide Applications: you can use this bottle kit to make different styles of potion bottle jewelry that can be made into necklaces, bracelets, decorative ornaments, or other Halloween props for children and friends, with DIY making as a core feature, this witches potion decor can be applied to decorate Halloween party, Halloween tiered trays, Halloween rooms, witch potion shelves, Halloween tabletops, Halloween fireplace decorations
› See more product details
reviews_5s: So much fun. Weel crafted kit with glass bottles. Detailed sticker labels and real cork stopper. All supplies included. Highly recommend!
